compiled_state.title: As a developer, I have unit tests verifying the orchestrator hypothesis and RED gates
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Write unit tests that verify the orchestrator hypothesis validation gate and RED-before-fix gate behave correctly for valid, invalid, and edge-case investigation results.
**Why**: SC6 requires testable verification that the gates work — not just observation after deployment.
**Scope**:
- IN: Tests for missing hypothesis_tests, all-disproved, at least one confirmed, mechanical exemption
- OUT: Integration tests with real investigation agents

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, a test with an investigation result missing hypothesis_tests confirms the orchestrator rejects it
  ← Satisfies: "a test with an investigation result missing hypothesis_tests confirms the orchestrator rejects it"
- When this story is complete, a test with all verdict=disproved confirms escalation
  ← Satisfies: "a test with all verdict=disproved confirms escalation"
- When this story is complete, a test with at least one verdict=confirmed confirms progression to fix implementation
  ← Satisfies: "a test with at least one verdict=confirmed confirms progression to fix implementation"
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Testing] Test fixtures need valid/invalid RESULT JSON with hypothesis_tests section
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT: All three done definitions are satisfied by existing tests in tests/skills/test_fix_bug_skill.py::TestHypothesisValidationGate. DD1 (missing hypothesis_tests → reject) → test_hypothesis_gate_escalates_on_missing_hypothesis_tests. DD2 (all disproved → escalation) → test_hypothesis_gate_escalates_on_all_disproved. DD3 (confirmed → progression) → test_hypothesis_gate_proceeds_on_confirmed_verdict. All 12 tests in TestHypothesisValidationGate + TestRedBeforeFixGate + TestHardGatePreamble pass.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: All done definitions already satisfied by tests written in prior batches. DD1→test_hypothesis_gate_escalates_on_missing_hypothesis_tests, DD2→test_hypothesis_gate_escalates_on_all_disproved, DD3→test_hypothesis_gate_proceeds_on_confirmed_verdict. 12 gate tests pass.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
